Name: PC: Sonic Nexus 2008 RSDKv2
Creator: Sega|Christian Whitehead|RubberDuckyCooly|RMGRich
Maintainer: KMFDManic|Moonfire2560 
Category: Games
Prerequisite: Data.bin from Sonic Nexus 2008 Demo; RetroArch 184 Xtreme Amped MANDATORY install for environment dependencies; MUST pause game, THEN exit, to avoid C8 errors.
